title: mentha arvensis var. allionii
intro: Mentha arvensis var. allionii, also known as corn mint or wild mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant (Mentha arvensis) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it useful for treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. allionii include reducing nausea and vomiting, relieving headaches and fever, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
